operatingRule: Do not make production-risk changes without explicit owner approval.

projects.name: AgentOps Runtime
projects.role: Execution infrastructure for governed agents, skills, approval gates, traces, and evidence return.
projects.currentMilestone: Runtime RC stack merged to main; dry-run/no-op runtime supports intake, routing, approvals, traces, sandbox, readiness validation, audit packages, and RC review.
blockers: Live execution remains disabled; owner-approved controlled execution implementation is required before any real skill or tool execution.

projects.name: Meta-Agent
projects.role: Portfolio intelligence, Chief of Staff planning, routing, approvals, registry, and weekly reporting.
projects.currentMilestone: Portfolio runtime integration status tracks AgentOps Runtime RC main and downstream VDS/Aurelean readiness gates.
blockers: Keep runtime integration evidence current as AgentOps Runtime PRs land.

projects.name: VDS DesignOS
projects.role: First production candidate and architecture studio operating system.
projects.currentMilestone: Production readiness remains routed through AgentOps dry-run runtime evidence and owner approval gates.
blockers: Supabase, Stripe, Vercel, OpenAI live-mode, rollback, and monitoring evidence require owner confirmation; live runtime execution is not enabled.

projects.name: Aurelean Platform
projects.role: Launch-closer ready textile sourcing and RFQ platform.
projects.currentMilestone: Launch closer checklist remains governed by AgentOps dry-run runtime evidence and owner approval gates.
blockers: Admin token, session secret, demo-mode, and Render production environment must be owner-provided; live runtime execution is not enabled.

projects.name: Meridian Yacht Atelier
projects.role: Yacht procurement, client portal, vendor management, and atelier operations platform.
projects.currentMilestone: Client portal/backend PRD and procurement workflow scope.
blockers: Future backend scope must be separated from current implementation.

projects.name: Monsieur App / Aelier Groupe Commerce Layer
projects.role: Luxury commerce, made-to-measure, fibre passport, private client, and Stripe checkout scope.
projects.currentMilestone: Scope PRD or blocked record depending on repository availability.
blockers: Local folder exists but is not a Git checkout; remote repository availability is unconfirmed.
